docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LIU, YUE TI AS TO DEFENDANT BRANNAN, ALLAN PAUL. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2004 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRANNAN, ALLAN PAUL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, YUE TI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRANNAN, ALLAN PAUL. $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,297.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27723, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, YUE TI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRANNAN, ALLAN PAUL. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27723 ON DECEMBER 03,2004 EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS. JUDGT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APPLAN PAUL BRANNAN-APPELLANT & AGAINST YUE TI LIU-RESPONDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
